message:
🐛 fix(cards): remove noisy console.error calls across 5 card components (Issue 8816) (#9274)

Consolidated sweep addressing @khushal-winner's 5 in-flight PRs (#8820,
#8821, #8822, #8823, #8824) which all target parent Auto-QA finding
#8816 ('console.error without user-visible error handling').

### Per-file removals (8 total)

| File                    | Count | Why safe |
|-------------------------|------:|----------|
| MatchGame.tsx           |     1 | Toast already surfaces 'Could not load high scores' |
| StockMarketTicker.tsx   |     3 | Silent fallback to mock data is intended UX; search failure toast already shown |
| CardChat.tsx            |     1 | Toast already shown to user on send failure |
| DynamicCard.tsx         |     1 | setError() renders the message inline |
| UserManagement.tsx      |     2 | Toasts already surface role-update and delete failures |

### Why a single PR instead of khushal-winner's 5

Each of @khushal-winner's PRs was substantively valid (real console.error
removals), but the diffs were inflated by unrelated brace-style prettier
churn from a differing editor config ('foo: 12 }' → 'foo: 12\n}'),
making them harder to review and failing ts-null-safety (AI-pattern
ratchet) because the reformat-only lines were flagged. PR #8822 also
overlapped PR #8821 on StockMarketTicker.

This PR keeps only the substantive removals, drops the dead error
parameter in each catch (now a bare 'catch { ... }' where the binding
was only used for the logging), and adds a short comment per site
citing the source Issue 8816. No formatting churn elsewhere.

Once this lands, #8820 / #8821 / #8822 / #8823 / #8824 can be closed as
superseded with a thank-you note to @khushal-winner for the
investigation.

Issue 8816 is already closed (by #8831); no 'Fixes #' trailer needed.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
